attacking_style: Initiates early attacks on final climbs to force selection and disrupt sprinter teams. Attacks from distance rather than waiting for final kilometers, creating small elite groups.
team_tactics: Functions as an aggressor to animate the race and break up organized chase efforts, forcing peloton fragmentation rather than controlling tempo himself.
terrain_preference: Medium-mountain stages with challenging final climbs where sustained efforts can create selections without requiring explosive climbing power of pure GC contenders.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing speed to convert breakaway efforts into wins when contested by stronger finishers in reduced groups.
key_patterns: Attacks first on final climbs to create small elite groups (2 observations)
Maintains position in final selections throughout entire stage, not just late attacks (2 observations)
Role centers on animating racing and forcing peloton splits rather than team tempo control (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: insufficient recent data with 5-year gap between observations
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12
